title: 1760 Pcs/ 20 Sheets Star Stickers, Coloured Foil Metallic Reward Stickers, Assorted Colors, 0.4" Diameter, Aluminum Foil, Ideal for Classroom, Office, Crafts
features: Package Contents - You will receive 20 sheets/1760pcs star stickers in assorted colors, 88pcs stars stickers in each sheet. Ensure to apply on smooth, clean, and dry surfaces for optimal adhesion.
Quality Materials - These self-adhesive star stickers are made of quality aluminum foil material, which is safe and non-toxic, with good adhesion and not easy to slip off.
Size - Each star sticker is about 1 cm/0.4 inch in diameter, the small size makes them look very cute and loved by kids.

8 Sparkling Colours & Easy To Apply - Red, rose red, blue, dark blue, purple, yellow, orange, green. These self-adhesive star stickers simply apply them to a smooth, clean, dry surface and are also easy to remove.

Wide Application - Ideal for classrooms, offices, crafts, and more, these star stickers are perfect for rewarding achievements, decorating, and adding flair to any surface. Enjoy your creations with these shiny stickers!
description: WOLMIK 1760 Pcs/ 20 Sheets Star Stickers Labels, Coloured Foil Star Metallic Stickers Reward, 8 Assorted Colors Star Stickers 0.4" Diameter Colorful Reward Stickers, for Teacher Classroom School Office
